=== qnn-net-run binary_updates help ===
  [ --model_prefix=<val> ]
                        Function prefix to use when loading <qnn_model_name.so>.
                        Default: QnnModel
  [ --retrieve_context=<val> ]
                        Path to cached binary from which to load a saved
                        context from and execute graphs. --retrieve_context and
                        --model are mutually exclusive. Only one of the options
                        can be specified at a time.
  [ --binary_updates=<val> ]
                        Path to yaml that contains paths to binary updates.
                        Updates are applied after initial graph execution on
                        a per graph basis.
  [ --perf_profile=<val> ]
                        Specifies perf profile to set. Valid settings are
                        "low_balanced", "balanced", "default","high_performance",
                        "sustained_high_performance", "burst","low_power_saver",
                        "power_saver", "high_power_saver", "custom(for internal use only)",
                        "extreme_power_saver" and "system_settings".
  [ --config_file=<val> ]
                        Path to a JSON config file. The config file currently
                        supports options related to backend extensions and
                        context priority. Please refer to SDK documentation
                        for more details.
  [ --log_level=<val> ] 
                        Specifies max logging level to be set. Valid settings:
                        "error", "warn", "info" and "verbose".
  [ --duration=<val> ]  Specifies the duration of the graph execution in seconds.
=== lora updater help ===
qairt-lora-adapter-bin-updater pid:2831
logging initialized

Command Line Options:
  [ --help ]            Displays this help message.
  [ --version ]         Displays version information.
  [ --modified_adapter_path=<val> ]
                        The modified adapter safetensor file path.
  [ --other_adapter_paths=<val> ]
                        The other adapter safetensor file paths required to update the binaries.
                        Paths must be provided in comma seperated format.
                        E.g., <safetensor_path1>,<safetensor_path2>
  [ --lora_metadata_dlc=<val> ]
                        Path to the DLC file that contains metadata on Lora tensor transformations.
  [ --old_adapter_binary_files=<val> ]
                        The old adapter binary file paths required to create updated binaries.
                        Paths to the old adapter binary files must be provided in comma separated format.
                        E.g., <old_adapter_binary_file1>,<old_adapter_binary_file2>
  [ --output_dir=<val> ]
                        The directory to save output files to. Defaults to ./output.
  --backend=<val>       Path to the backend library to be used to update the adapter binaries.
  [ --log_level=<val> ] 
                        Specifies max logging level to be set. Valid settings:
                        "error", "warn", "info" and "verbose".
  [ --dump_safetensors ]
                        Argument to dump the final safetensors.
  [ --strip_metadata ]  Argument to remove updatable metadata of the adapter binary during the update.
